nasb.text: Now Moses went up from the plains of Moab to Mount Nebo, to the top of Pisgah, which is opposite Jericho. And the Lord showed him all the land, Gilead as far as Dan,

esv.text: Then Moses went up from the plains of Moab to Mount Nebo, to the top of Pisgah, which is opposite Jericho. And the Lord showed him all the land, Gilead as far as Dan,

cnv.text: 摩西從摩押平原上了尼波山，就是上了耶利哥對面的毘斯迦山頂。耶和華把全地指給他看，就是把基列直到但，

ccb.text: 摩西从摩押平原登上尼波山，上到耶利哥对面的毗斯迦山顶。耶和华把整片土地指给他看，从基列一直到但，
